properties.remark: A BRIEF TORNADO OCCURRED OVER OPEN COUNTRY. IT WAS OBSERVED BY SEVERAL PEOPLE FROM VARIOUS LOCATIONS. NO KNOWN DAMAGE OCCURRED, SO IT WILL BE RATED EF-UNKNOWN.
EF-0 TORNADO SNAPPED TREE LIMBS, DAMAGED THE ROOFS OF SEVERAL HOMES, AND DAMAGED OR DESTROYED SEVERAL BARNS.
PRYOR MESONET LOCATED 5 MILES S OF ADAIR MEASURED 81.4 MPH THUNDERSTORM WIND GUST.
SOCIAL MEDIA REPORT OF HALF DOLLAR TO PING PONG BALL WEST OF WARNER.

THIS TORNADO DEVELOPED SOUTHWEST OF TEXANNA, AND MOVED NORTHEAST TOWARD DUCHESS LANDING. OUTBUILDINGS WERE DESTROYED, THE ROOFS OF HOMES WERE DAMAGED, AND TREES WERE UPROOTED ALONG THE 8.6 MILE-LONG PATH.
A TORNADO BLEW THE ROOFS FROM SEVERAL OUTBUILDINGS, AND UPROOTED TREES.
ROOF BLOWN OFF A BARN AND INTO SIDE OF A SINGLE FAMILY HOME IN KEEFETON. NO INJURIES.
REPORT FROM AMATEUR RADIO OF TREES DOWN AND HAIL RANGING FROM PEAS TO QUARTER SIZE 1 MILE NORTH OF WOODALL SCHOOL.

A TORNADO WAS OBSERVED FOR SEVERAL MINUTES. BASED ON RADAR DATA IT OCCURRED OVER ROBERT S KERR RESERVOIR. A DAMAGE SURVEY TEAM FOUND NO DAMAGE ON THE SHORES OF THE LAKE, SO IT LIKELY REMAINED OVER THE LAKE DURING ITS ENTIRE LIFE CYCLE. SINCE NO DAMAGE COULD BE FOUND/ACCESSED, THE TORNADO WILL BE RATED EF-UNKNOWN.
RELAY VIA SOCIAL MEDIA.
RELAYED BY BROADCAST MEDIA.
